title: Balanced — R3 close
description: Typical mid-market deal with a buyer cap (₹415) comfortably above the seller's R3-accept threshold (₹360) but below seller's target (₹385). Demonstrates the most common shape of a real deal: both sides converge through 3 rounds and meet in the seller's 'good enough' band. Buyer opening is random ₹250–₹320; the closing window is shaped by maxBudgetPerUnit which today's parser honors.

expectedOutcome.likely: 3-round close at ~₹375–₹395/unit. Total deal ~₹18.7–₹19.7M. Full downstream pipeline runs: PO → Invoice → DD auto-accept → ACTUS PAM SUCCESS.
expectedOutcome.possible: If LLM has full headroom (Gemini healthy, no rate-limit), may close in round 2 at ~₹390. Audit will show usedFallback=false on the closing round.
expectedOutcome.failureMode: Rule-fallback path may produce a more mechanical-looking round trail (counter prices step in fixed ratios). Audit honestly labels usedFallback=true. Deal still closes.

declaredButDeferred: sellerIntent (entirely — seller acts on its own .env config)
